## Scope

What changed?

## AI assistance

- [ ] No AI-assisted code
- [ ] AI-assisted code present

## Risk area

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Tests or harnesses
- [ ] Security or auth
- [ ] Data or provenance
- [ ] Dependency or CI

## Verification

- [ ] Repo tests pass
- [ ] Proof/selftest checks pass if relevant

- [ ] Reviewer checked silent-failure risk
